title: Three Calm Breaths
prompt: Take three slow breaths and write one word for how your body feels now.
safety_note: Stop if the exercise feels uncomfortable.

title: Five Senses Scan
prompt: Name one thing you can see, hear, touch, smell, and taste.
safety_note: Keep the activity observational and non-judgmental.

title: One Sentence Check-In
prompt: Complete this sentence: Right now, I need a little more...
safety_note: Do not request sensitive health history.

title: Two-Minute Reset
prompt: Stretch, walk, or change posture for two minutes.
safety_note: Choose a movement that is safe for your body.

title: Hydration Pause
prompt: Drink water or prepare a drink, then notice one small shift.
safety_note: Avoid prescriptive nutrition or medical advice.

title: Tiny Next Step
prompt: Choose one small action you can complete in less than ten minutes.
safety_note: Keep the task optional and user-controlled.

title: Gratitude Dot
prompt: Write down one person, place, or moment you appreciate today.
safety_note: Do not force positivity or minimize hard feelings.

title: Quiet Kindness
prompt: Pick one low-effort kind action for yourself or someone else.
safety_note: Avoid activities that create obligation or pressure.

title: Support Check-In
prompt: Identify one supportive resource, person, or place available to you.
safety_note: Include crisis-resource routing in later versions.
